settings.promo_text: Free shipping on orders over 799 Kč. Limited-time offer.
settings.multibuy_text: Buy 2 and keep one as a backup — perfect for multi-pet homes!
settings.accordion_1_content: Made with pet-safe, non-toxic materials designed for everyday play and lasting joy.
settings.accordion_2_content: Orders are processed within 1–3 business days. Tracking details are sent as soon as your order ships.
settings.accordion_3_content: Always supervise your pet when introducing new toys, accessories, or products.
settings.accordion_4_content: Introduce the product slowly and let your pet explore it at their own pace.
settings.accordion_5_content: Check the product photos and description for what comes in the package.

settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: Orders are typically delivered within 3–7 business days depending on your location.

settings.question: Do you ship worldwide?
settings.answer: We currently ship to selected countries. Check checkout for availability in your region.

settings.question: How can I track my order?
settings.answer: You will receive a tracking link by email once your order has been dispatched.

settings.question: Can I return my order?
settings.answer: Yes! We offer easy 30-day returns. Contact us and we will guide you through the process.

settings.question: Are the products safe for pets?
settings.answer: All Tailand products are made with pet-safe, non-toxic materials and tested for safety.

settings.question: What if my pet does not like the product?
settings.answer: Contact our team and we will do our best to find a solution that makes both you and your pet happy.
